metadata.description: AWS cloud plugins for Claude Code — content creation and infrastructure operations

plugins.name: aws-content-plugin
plugins.description: AWS cloud content creation — presentations, architecture diagrams, animated diagrams, documents, GitBook sites, and workshops

plugins.name: aws-ops-plugin
plugins.description: AWS/EKS infrastructure operations — troubleshooting, networking, IAM, observability, storage, database, and cost optimization

plugins.name: kiro-power-converter
plugins.description: Convert Claude Code plugins to Kiro Power format — supports GitHub URL, local path, marketplace name, and individual skill conversion
